title: [codereview-P4] api.py: duplicate position parsing logic in add_node/move_node
description: python/src/lichen/sim/api.py:319-340 and 385-402: both methods have nearly identical float conversion + isfinite validation + error handling for x,y,z. This violates DRY. Extract private helper _parse_position(body: dict, defaults: tuple[float,float,float] | None = None) -> tuple[float,float,float] that does the validation. Would reduce duplication and centralize the NaN/Inf rejection. Tagged codereview. Follows from project-LICHEN-b5il fix. P4 as it is maintainability.
close_reason: Added _parse_position helper to centralize NaN/Inf + numeric validation for Node positions in add_node and move_node. Duplication eliminated, error handling improved with specific ValueError. Verified with manual tests. This was the P4 codereview finding from project-LICHEN-b5il.
